title: 4. He tended to select points on the limbs, and he would rather make mistakes by
text:
shallow puncture, which was like an insect bite, and could never gain any effect. Since it is kind of joining
method, deep puncture strengthens the tie between channels and is indicated for patients who need more
than one channel stimulated. It is consistent with the principle of a single needle that works on several
points, not only lessening the suffering of needle insertion, but also strengthening the stimulation and
improving effectiveness.
